weapon-properties.name: Max Action 1
weapon-properties.effect: May shoot or fight up to 1 times a turn

weapon-properties.name: Max Action 2
weapon-properties.effect: May shoot or fight up to 2 times a turn

weapon-properties.name: Max Action 3
weapon-properties.effect: May shoot or fight up to 3 times a turn

weapon-properties.name: Aim 1
weapon-properties.effect: May take 1 Aim action. Each Aim action adds +1DT to the model’s next Shoot action if taken before their turn ends

weapon-properties.name: Aim 2
weapon-properties.effect: May take 2 Aim action. Each Aim action adds +1DT to the model’s next Shoot action if taken before their turn ends

weapon-properties.name: Close Range
weapon-properties.effect: -1DT range > 1 stick

weapon-properties.name: Heavy
weapon-properties.effect: +1 to Under Fire or under Attack rolls

weapon-properties.name: Heavy when close
weapon-properties.effect: +1 to Under Fire rolls, when target is range <= 1 stick

weapon-properties.name: Precise
weapon-properties.effect: Reroll FP or Prw rolls of 1(with this weapon)

weapon-properties.name: Ultra Precise
weapon-properties.effect: Reroll FP rolls of 1 or 2

weapon-properties.name: Precise when long range
weapon-properties.effect: Reroll FP rolls of 1,when further than 1 stick away

weapon-properties.name: Wide Range
weapon-properties.effect: cannot target enemies < 1 stick away

weapon-properties.name: Cone Attack
weapon-properties.effect: Cone AOE

weapon-properties.name: Blast Attack
weapon-properties.effect: Blast AOE

weapon-properties.name: Weak
weapon-properties.effect: -1DT to Prw rolls

weapon-properties.name: Ranged Melee
weapon-properties.effect: Can target enemies up to 1 stick away

weapon-properties.name: Item
weapon-properties.effect: you may not make Melee or Ranged attacks with this weapon.

weapon-properties.name: One time use
weapon-properties.effect: can only be used once.

weapon-properties.name: Passive
weapon-properties.effect: Bonus is always active

weapon-properties.name: Active
weapon-properties.effect: require a Use Item action

weapon-properties.name: Powerful
weapon-properties.effect: +1 to Prw rolls

weapon-properties.name: Grenade Damage
weapon-properties.effect: Targets point up to 1 stick from attacke and deals 2d10 FP

weapon-properties.name: Defensive
weapon-properties.effect: +1 to Def rolls

weapon-properties.name: Fly
weapon-properties.effect: The model can ignore terrain and other models when taking Move actions

weapon-properties.name: Heal
weapon-properties.effect: 1 model touching this model becomes ready

weapon-properties.name: Willfull
weapon-properties.effect: +1 to Will rolls

weapon-properties.name: Stealthy
weapon-properties.effect: If this model’s base touches a piece of terrain, enemy models do not have LoS unless they are within 1 stick of the stealthy model

weapon-properties.name: Good Shot
weapon-properties.effect: +1 to FP rolls

spells.name: Fear
spells.effect: Each enemy model within 1 stick who loses its opposed Will roll must move 1 stick away from the psychic.

spells.name: Healing
spells.effect: Each enemy model within 1 stick who loses its opposed Will roll must move 1 stick away from the psychic.

spells.name: Meat Puppet
spells.effect: Return 1 OoA model to the table and place within 1 stick of the psychic. The returned model’s Spd is reduced by 1 (min 1), and rolls with -1DT for all rolls. A model can only be returned to the table once.

spells.name: Mind Control
spells.effect: ETargeted enemy takes one action of the psychic’s choice.

spells.name: Mind Stab
spells.effect: Target 1 enemy model within 1 stick. Roll on Under Fire table +3.

spells.name: Prescience
spells.effect: EChoose any model on the table to either gain +1DT or -1DT for all their actions this round.

spells.name: Telekinesis
spells.effect: Effect: move 1 obstacle or ally up to 1 stick. Attack: move an enemy 1 stick.

spells.name: Teleport
spells.effect: Place the psychic anywhere on the board.

leader_traits.name: Bounty Hunter
leader_traits.effect: Once per round, when a model from your warband is touching a down or staggered enemy, it can take a Use Item action to make the enemy model out of action.

leader_traits.name: Healer
leader_traits.effect: During the Initiative Phase, one of your models within one stick of your leader may make a free Stand or Recover action with +1DT.

leader_traits.name: Majestic
leader_traits.effect: Any time one of your warband has to make a Willpower roll, that model may use the Leader’s Willpower instead.

leader_traits.name: Monstrous
leader_traits.effect: Non-Leader models must win a Willpower roll vs. your leader to move into contact.

leader_traits.name: Political Officer
leader_traits.effect: During the Initiative Phase, before rolling, take one of your Warband within LOS of your leader out of action to make all other models in the Warband ready, remove the broken condition from your warband, and gain +1DT to this Initiative roll.

leader_traits.name: Sorcerer
leader_traits.effect: Psychic Powers actions cost 1 Sorcerer action instead of 2, but may still only use 1 per turn.

warband_traits.name: Cyborgs
warband_traits.effect: All members of the Warband can purchase 1 additional piece of equipment.

warband_traits.name: Fanatics
warband_traits.effect: Roll Willpower with +1DT for all rolls except Psychic Powers.

warband_traits.name: Living Weapons
warband_traits.effect: Unarmed attacks do not have -1DT to Prowess rolls.

warband_traits.name: Heavily Armed
warband_traits.effect: All Ranged weapons cost 1 point less.

warband_traits.name: Mutants
warband_traits.effect: Speed, Claws & Teeth, Horrible Claws & Teeth, and Whip/Tail cost 1 less point.

warband_traits.name: Soldiers
warband_traits.effect: Grenades, Heavy Armor, and Medkits may be purchased for free. They still use a model’s equipment slots.

warband_traits.name: Undead
warband_traits.effect: A second staggered condition does not take models in this Warband out of action.
